name: Freezer Mix Barley Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the container of frozen mix into hot water just to loosen.
2. In a Dutch oven, heat the frozen mix and remaining ingredients until boiling.
3. Reduce heat and cover; simmer, stirring frequently, until the mix is thawed and barley and vegetables are tender, 30 to 40 minutes.
4. Remove the bay leaf.
